Q_helical_lift_diagnostics.note: Current DASHI Q acts on scalar seam amplitudes. This audit builds a candidate canonical helical-channel lift and measures channel-block structure; it does not identify Q with a Waleffe triad operator.

Q_helical_coupling_certificate_diagnosti.Q_decomposition: Q_N = D_N + E_N; D_N is helical channel block diagonal
